svg.title: Smart Cane Circuit Diagram
svg.desc: Raspberry Pi Zero 2W connected to VL53L5CX ToF sensor, Pi Camera, MPU6050 IMU, three DRV2605L haptic drivers with LRA motors, and power management
svg.text: All I²C devices on same bus (GPIO 2 SDA, GPIO 3 SCL) · 3.3V logic level · pull-up resistors 4.7kΩ
DRV2605L I²C addresses configurable via ADR pin · LRA motors 2V RMS rated
